## Workflow Category
[What workflow is being audited or compared?]

## Required Sections Checklist
- [ ] Unique title and meta description
- [ ] Exactly one H1 ("Audit Your [Workflow] Before Automating It With AI" if applicable)
- [ ] Why it's tempting to automate
- [ ] What can go wrong
- [ ] What the GPT checks / Readiness factors
- [ ] Suggested safe pilot / Human review checkpoints
- [ ] CTA band (using correct URL)
- [ ] 4-6 FAQs
- [ ] JSON-LD schemas (Article, FAQPage)

## Additional context
[Any other details, competitor comparisons needed, etc.]
